# Adversarial test fixtures

Skeleton inputs for future redaction/curator/reviewer tests. All content is
**fake but realistic** -- no real names, emails, URLs, or private data.

All adversarial fixtures must remain fake and must not include real private
data. Realistic-looking examples are acceptable only when invented. Never
commit actual names, addresses, course registrations, medical records, or
financial information -- even in test fixtures.

Categories:
- `names.txt` -- real-looking personal names in various contexts
- `emails.txt` -- email addresses in text
- `repo_urls.txt` -- private/internal repository URLs
- `course_codes.txt` -- DTU course codes with semesters
- `mixed.txt` -- benign text surrounding doxxing fragments
- `sensitive.txt` -- medical, financial, relationship, location content
